# ɳTasks Privacy Policy

**Last updated:** April 7, 2026

## Overview

ɳTasks is an open-source task management application. It is designed to connect to a self-hosted backend that you control. We do not operate servers that store your task data.

## Data Collection

### What we do NOT collect
- We do not collect, store, or process your tasks, notes, or personal data
- We do not use analytics or tracking SDKs
- We do not serve advertisements
- We do not sell or share any user data

### What the app stores locally
- Backend connection URL and authentication token (stored in secure device storage)
- User preferences (theme, notification settings)
- Offline task cache for sync

### Network connections
ɳTasks connects only to the backend server URL you configure. No other network requests are made. If you use the free hosted version at task.nself.org, that instance is subject to the nSelf privacy policy at https://nself.org/privacy.

## Data Storage

All task data is stored on the backend server you choose to connect to. If you self-host with the nSelf CLI, your data stays on your own hardware. We have no access to it.

Local device storage includes your connection settings and an offline cache of tasks for sync purposes. This data never leaves your device except when syncing with your configured backend.

## Third-Party Services

ɳTasks does not integrate with any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.

## Push Notifications

If you enable push notifications, they are delivered through Apple Push Notification Service (iOS) or Firebase Cloud Messaging (Android). Notification tokens are stored on your backend server, not on any server we operate.

## Children's Privacy

ɳTasks does not knowingly collect data from children under 13. The app contains no advertising or tracking.

## Changes to This Policy

Updates will be posted at https://nself.org/privacy/ntasks. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision.

## Contact

For privacy questions: privacy@nself.org
